sizing_rule.note: Tangent portfolio optimization via Sharpe ratio maximization: MAX{(AHPR-(1+RFR))/SD}. Derives optimal_f from efficient frontier coordinates. optimal_f value must be calculated from historical HPR data; use fractional Kelly (0.25–0.50 × optimal_f) in live trading to reduce variance.

source_rule_text: Identify the tangent portfolio on the efficient frontier by maximizing the ratio of excess return to standard deviation, which represents the optimal portfolio for geometric growth maximization.
